ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the institution */,
  "physical_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the institution */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was established */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of the institution (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the program is offered (e.g., fall, spring) */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Degree level of the program (e.g., masters, Ph.D.) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program (e.g., 2 years) */,
  "program_format" TEXT /* Format of the program (e.g., full-time, part-time, online) */,
  "program_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the program can accommodate */,
  "program_director" TEXT /* Name of the program director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, admissions officer, counselor) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the application */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the application is for */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made on the application (e.g., accepted, rejected, pending) */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., in review, pending, completed) */,
  "application_fee_paid" INTEGER /* Whether the application fee has been paid */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of any scheduled interviews */,
  "interview_status" TEXT /* Status of the interview (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the document is for */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., transcript, letter of recommendation) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., pending review, approved, rejected) */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the note is for */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment added by the user */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., personal, feedback, reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deadlines" (
  "deadline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deadline */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the deadline is for */,
  "deadline_date" TEXT /* Date of the deadline */,
  "deadline_type" TEXT /* Type of deadline (e.g., application deadline, decision deadline) */,
  "deadline_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the deadline */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date a reminder notification should be sent */,
  "deadline_status" TEXT /* Status of the deadline (e.g., upcoming, past, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deadline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deadlines_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the requirement is for */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Admission requirement (e.g., GPA, GRE score) */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., academic, test score) */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requirement */,
  "requirement_status" TEXT /* Status of the requirement (e.g., met, not met, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the fee is for */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., application fee, tuition) */,
  "fee_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the fee */,
  "payment_status" INTEGER /* Whether the fee has been paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the analytic is for */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., acceptance rate, average GPA) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., application status, deadline reminder) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
